caption:
一束花落在掌心，一抹新绿爬上枝头，清明是一段被春色轻轻托起的时分🌿。空气带着微湿的温度，草木悄然舒展，思念也随之变得柔软，不再沉重，在四月里悄然发芽🌱，带着淡淡的光和暖。

古人言：“清明时节雨纷纷”，出自杜牧《清明》，写的是天色亦是心境🌫️。雨意未至，山色已新，记忆随着风缓缓铺开，在枝叶之间，在行走之间，缓缓归于心底。名字不必反复提起，情感自有回声，清浅却绵长🍃。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨此致意：愿你于此时节，见山是春，念人如常🌼；把温柔留给过往，把热爱交给此刻，让脚步继续向前，让心意始终有光✨。

A flower rests gently in the palm, while fresh green quietly emerges along the branches. Qingming comes as a moment gently lifted by spring 🌿. The air carries a slight hint of moisture as nature awakens at its own pace. Thoughts of remembrance grow gentler in this season, no longer heavy, quietly taking root in April 🌱 with a soft sense of warmth and light.

As the old verse by Du Mu goes, “Drizzling rain falls like tears on the Mourning Day", reflecting both the weather and the state of the heart 🌫️. Even before the rain arrives, the mountains are already renewed. Memories drift with the breeze, settling into the quietest place deep within us. Names do not need to be spoken often, as feelings remain and echo softly over time 🍃.

Chinese Language Society of Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) extends our warm regards. May you, in this season, feel life quietly flourishing all around, while those you hold dear remain gently present in your heart as always 🌼; may you leave your gentleness with the past, place your passion in the present, continue moving forward, and carry a steady light within ✨.

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会第二十九届迎新系列活动筹委招募启事

🌟 青春不止，热情不灭，创意无限！

迎新系列活动再次展开，我们期待有责任感、有热忱的你加入我们的筹备团队。
这不仅是新生认识华文学会的第一步，更是你融入校园生活的重要契机。

作为筹委，你将有机会：
- 与一群志同道合的伙伴并肩作战
- 将创意化为现实，打造难忘的校园回忆
- 在合作与挑战中提升自我，留下属于你的独特印记

💡 无论你是否有筹办经验，只要你愿意投入热情，勇于承担责任，并享受团队合作的乐趣，我们都欢迎你的加入！

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) 
29th Orientation Series Event Organising Committee Recruitment

🌟 Youth never fades, passion never ends, creativity knows no limits!

The Orientation Series Event is back, and we are looking for dedicated, enthusiastic individuals to join our organising team. 
This is not only the first step for freshies to get to know our society, but also a vital opportunity for you to integrate into campus life. 

As an organising committee member, you will:
- Work alongside like-minded peers
- Turn creativity into reality and craft unforgettable memories
- Grow through teamwork and challenges, leaving your unique mark on campus life

💡 Whether you have prior experience in event planning or not, as long as you are passionate, responsible, and eager to collaborate, we welcome you with open arms!

🎉 2026 Special Event Proposal Recruitment is Now Open!

Do you have exciting event ideas but never had the chance to make them happen? This is your opportunity! ✨
We welcome all creative members to submit 2026 special event proposals and turn your ideas into real events while creating meaningful experiences together.

The theme and format are open. Your proposal only needs to follow the society’s six principles and promote culture, innovation, and teamwork. Whether it is a cultural event, competition, workshop, or any creative activity, your ideas are welcome!

📌 Submission Method
Please send your proposal to: cls.mmu.cyber@gmail.com
Proposal Requirements: event introduction, objectives, budget, timeline, etc.

Proposal Interview Period: 22 April 2026 (Wed) – 24 April 2026 (Fri)

Event Preparation Period: June 2026 - November 2026

caption:
🌟 想认识更多志同道合的朋友吗？想让大学生活留下更难忘的回忆吗？外务团等你来加入！

🎯 外务团是什么？
外务团成立于2022年12月11日，主要协助外务副主席处理华会的外交事务，包括：
* 接待来访校园的外校学生团体
* 协助宣传华文学会的各项精彩活动
* 参与其他院校的活动，与更多人交流互动

🎮 适合加入外务团的你：
* 乐于社交，喜欢与人沟通
* 想认识更多朋友（说不定还能遇见特别的人哦！）
* 希望累积活动经验，提升组织与沟通能力
* 或者只是想让大学生活多一点不一样的体验

不论你是否符合以上条件，我们都欢迎你的加入！

别再犹豫啦，赶快点击链接填写表格，和我们一起创造属于外务团的精彩回忆吧！

🔗 报名链接： 
https://forms.gle/wZp4Qo9Wx1GpwKzM7
⏰ 报名截止日期： 22/03/2026 （星期日）

☎️ 欲知更多详情，请联络： 
谢紫欣 017-8724229

🌟 Do you want to meet like-minded friends and create unforgettable memories during your university life? The External Affairs Division is waiting for you!

🎯 What is the External Affairs Division?
Established on 11th December 2022, the External Affairs Division primarily assists the Vice President of External Affairs in handling the Chinese Language Society’s external affairs, including:
- Hosting visiting student groups from other universities
- Promoting the exciting activities of the Chinese Language Society
- Participating in events at other universities and building connections with more people

🎮 Who should join the External Affairs Division?
- Students who love socializing and enjoy interacting with others
- Anyone who wants to make new friends (maybe even meet someone special!)
- Those eager to gain event management experience and enhance their organizational and communication skills
- Or students who simply want to add some excitement to their university life

No matter whether you fit the traits above or not, everyone is welcome to join us!

Don’t hesitate—click the link below to fill out the form and create amazing memories with the External Affairs Division!

🔗 Registration Link: 
https://forms.gle/wZp4Qo9Wx1GpwKzM7
⏰ Application Deadline: 22nd March 2026 (Sunday)

☎️ For more information, please contact:
Chia Zhi Sin 017-8724229

caption:
第二十九届会员福利 · 别再白白错过啦

你该不会真的只在报名活动的时候，才想起那张会员卡吧？
其实它更常出现在你吃饭、买饮料、日常走走停停的那些瞬间里。从校园内到校外，一点点被用掉的小优惠，慢慢就会变成你大学生活里最真实的“加分项”。

会员福利从来不只是活动优惠，它更像是一种默默陪你过日子的存在。
当你开始习惯带上它，你就会发现，这张卡比想象中更值得，也更常被用到。

福利有效期限：6/4/2026 - 12/3/2027
至于有哪些好康——就在海报上等你解锁，记得带上那张属于你的会员卡。👀

如有任何疑问，请联络：
谢紫欣 017-8724229

29th Membership Benefits · Don’t Let It Go to Waste

You're not just remembering your membership card when signing up for events… right? Honestly, it actually shows up way more in your everyday life — meals, drinks, and those little in-between moments around campus and beyond.

Those small perks might not seem like much at first, but they quietly add up and make your uni life a little smoother. Membership benefits aren’t just about events — they’re something you’ll find yourself using more often than you expected.

Benefit Validity: 6/4/2026 – 12/3/2027
Curious what’s included? It’s already on the poster; just don’t forget to bring your card along. 👀

For any inquiries, please contact:
Chia Zhi Sin 017-8724229

caption:
睽违三年，音乐的火花即将再次绽放🎶 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会第十四届沁瓶子创作发表会正式公开招募筹委啦！ ✨ 
你热爱音乐吗？你对活动策划充满热忱吗？经过了三年的漫长等待，沁瓶子创作发表会终于强势回归！ 这一次，我们将以震撼的现场乐队形式，把大学生最真挚的原创歌曲带上舞台🤩
 
为了打造这场难忘的音乐盛宴，我们需要充满热血与才华的你加入我们的核心团队！🔥
我们目前正在寻找以下八个小组的得力干将。无论你是想挑战影音前后期与 MV 拍摄、负责吸睛的主视觉设计、策划出色的宣传与公关策略，还是想在节目统筹、场控、文书与财务管理上大展身手，这里都有属于你发光发热的舞台！

🎤 正在寻找的神仙队友包括：
秘书、财政、节目统筹组、场地组、宣传组、公关组、创设组，以及多媒体组

Do you love music? Are you passionate about event planning? After a long wait of three years, the Fresh Bottle Recital is making a powerful comeback! This time, we will bring the most heartfelt original songs by university students onto the stage through a dynamic live band performance🤩

caption:
一束花落在掌心，一抹新绿爬上枝头，清明是一段被春色轻轻托起的时分🌿。空气带着微湿的温度，草木悄然舒展，思念也随之变得柔软，不再沉重，在四月里悄然发芽🌱，带着淡淡的光和暖。

古人言：“清明时节雨纷纷”，出自杜牧《清明》，写的是天色亦是心境🌫️。雨意未至，山色已新，记忆随着风缓缓铺开，在枝叶之间，在行走之间，缓缓归于心底。名字不必反复提起，情感自有回声，清浅却绵长🍃。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨此致意：愿你于此时节，见山是春，念人如常🌼；把温柔留给过往，把热爱交给此刻，让脚步继续向前，让心意始终有光✨。

A flower rests gently in the palm, while fresh green quietly emerges along the branches. Qingming comes as a moment gently lifted by spring 🌿. The air carries a slight hint of moisture as nature awakens at its own pace. Thoughts of remembrance grow gentler in this season, no longer heavy, quietly taking root in April 🌱 with a soft sense of warmth and light.

As the old verse by Du Mu goes, “Drizzling rain falls like tears on the Mourning Day", reflecting both the weather and the state of the heart 🌫️. Even before the rain arrives, the mountains are already renewed. Memories drift with the breeze, settling into the quietest place deep within us. Names do not need to be spoken often, as feelings remain and echo softly over time 🍃.

Chinese Language Society of Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) extends our warm regards. May you, in this season, feel life quietly flourishing all around, while those you hold dear remain gently present in your heart as always 🌼; may you leave your gentleness with the past, place your passion in the present, continue moving forward, and carry a steady light within ✨.

caption:
第二十九届会员福利 · 别再白白错过啦

你该不会真的只在报名活动的时候，才想起那张会员卡吧？
其实它更常出现在你吃饭、买饮料、日常走走停停的那些瞬间里。从校园内到校外，一点点被用掉的小优惠，慢慢就会变成你大学生活里最真实的“加分项”。

会员福利从来不只是活动优惠，它更像是一种默默陪你过日子的存在。
当你开始习惯带上它，你就会发现，这张卡比想象中更值得，也更常被用到。

福利有效期限：6/4/2026 - 12/3/2027
至于有哪些好康——就在海报上等你解锁，记得带上那张属于你的会员卡。👀

谢紫欣 017-8724229

29th Membership Benefits · Don’t Let It Go to Waste

You're not just remembering your membership card when signing up for events… right? Honestly, it actually shows up way more in your everyday life — meals, drinks, and those little in-between moments around campus and beyond.

Those small perks might not seem like much at first, but they quietly add up and make your uni life a little smoother. Membership benefits aren’t just about events — they’re something you’ll find yourself using more often than you expected.

Benefit Validity: 6/4/2026 – 12/3/2027
Curious what’s included? It’s already on the poster; just don’t forget to bring your card along. 👀

caption:
🐎✨ 马年大吉 · 万事奔腾 ✨🐎

金马迎春，万象更新。
多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会
衷心祝愿大家在马年里：
如骏马奔腾，勇往直前；
学业进步，事业顺利；
心想事成，万事胜意。

愿新的一年里，我们携手同行，
传承中华文化，
共创更加精彩的未来。

🐎✨ The Golden Horse welcomes the spring, ushering in new beginnings. ✨🐎

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya)
sincerely wishes everyone in the Year of the Horse:
to gallop forward with courage;
to achieve excellence in both studies and career;
and to see all dreams come true.

May we continue to move forward together in the new year,
preserve Chinese culture,
and create an even brighter future.

caption:
🌙✨ 开斋节快乐 · Selamat Hari Raya Aidilfitri ✨🌙

今天的空气，好像比平常多了一点香味。人们换上新衣，餐桌逐渐摆满佳肴，一句句“Maaf Zahir dan Batin”在手机讯息与笑声之间悄悄传递，团聚的气息也慢慢地铺满每一个角落。

一个月的修行与沉淀，让人学会耐心与温柔，也更懂得宽恕与珍惜。开斋节不只是庆祝斋戒的结束，更提醒我们带着澄澈的心重新出发，把不开心清零，把藏在心里的爱勇敢说出口。

在这充满灯火与欢笑的日子里，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会衷心祝愿大家回家有灯火相迎，餐桌有佳肴相伴，身边有笑声相随。愿你今年吃得满足、笑得真诚、爱得坦荡。

🌙✨ Happy Eid al-Fitr · Selamat Hari Raya Aidilfitri ✨🌙

Today, the air seems to carry a little more fragrance than usual. People put on new clothes, tables fill with festive dishes, and the greeting “Maaf Zahir dan Batin” is shared through messages and laughter as the joy of reunion slowly spreads everywhere.

After a month of reflection and devotion, Eid reminds us to move forward with patience, kindness, and forgiveness — to let go of what weighs on our hearts and to express the love we often keep unspoken.

On this joyful occasion, Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) sincerely wishes everyone a home filled with warmth, laughter, and togetherness. May you eat well, laugh sincerely, and love wholeheartedly.

sincerely wishes everyone in the Year of the Horse:

and to see all dreams come true.

preserve Chinese culture,
and create an even brighter future.

你热爱音乐吗？你对活动策划充满热忱吗？经过了三年的漫长等待，沁瓶子创作发表会终于强势回归！ 这一次，我们将以震撼的现场乐队形式，把大学生最真挚的原创歌曲带上舞台🤩

Do you love music? Are you passionate about event planning? After a long wait of three years, the Fresh Bottle Recital is making a powerful comeback! This time, we will bring the most heartfelt original songs by university students onto the stage through a dynamic live band performance🤩

To create this unforgettable musical experience, we are looking for passionate and talented individuals to join our core team! 🔥
We are currently recruiting for eight major divisions. caption:
🌟 想认识更多志同道合的朋友吗？想让大学生活留下更难忘的回忆吗？外务团等你来加入！

🎯 外务团是什么？
外务团成立于2022年12月11日，主要协助外务副主席处理华会的外交事务，包括：
* 接待来访校园的外校学生团体
* 协助宣传华文学会的各项精彩活动
* 参与其他院校的活动，与更多人交流互动

🎮 适合加入外务团的你：
* 乐于社交，喜欢与人沟通
* 想认识更多朋友（说不定还能遇见特别的人哦！）
* 希望累积活动经验，提升组织与沟通能力
* 或者只是想让大学生活多一点不一样的体验

不论你是否符合以上条件，我们都欢迎你的加入！

别再犹豫啦，赶快点击链接填写表格，和我们一起创造属于外务团的精彩回忆吧！

🔗 报名链接： 
https://forms.gle/wZp4Qo9Wx1GpwKzM7
⏰ 报名截止日期： 22/03/2026 （星期日）

☎️ 欲知更多详情，请联络： 
谢紫欣 017-8724229

🌟 Do you want to meet like-minded friends and create unforgettable memories during your university life? The External Affairs Division is waiting for you!

🎯 What is the External Affairs Division?
Established on 11th December 2022, the External Affairs Division primarily assists the Vice President of External Affairs in handling the Chinese Language Society’s external affairs, including:
- Hosting visiting student groups from other universities
- Promoting the exciting activities of the Chinese Language Society
- Participating in events at other universities and building connections with more people

🎮 Who should join the External Affairs Division?
- Students who love socializing and enjoy interacting with others
- Anyone who wants to make new friends (maybe even meet someone special!)
- Those eager to gain event management experience and enhance their organizational and communication skills
- Or students who simply want to add some excitement to their university life

No matter whether you fit the traits above or not, everyone is welcome to join us!

Don’t hesitate—click the link below to fill out the form and create amazing memories with the External Affairs Division!

🔗 Registration Link: 
https://forms.gle/wZp4Qo9Wx1GpwKzM7
⏰ Application Deadline: 22nd March 2026 (Sunday)

☎️ For more information, please contact:
Chia Zhi Sin 017-8724229

🎉 2026特别活动计划书正式开放招收！

你是否有很多有趣的活动想法，却一直没有机会实现？现在就是你的机会！✨
欢迎有想法、有创意的成员提交2026年的特别活动计划书，把你的创意付诸实现，与大家一起创造难忘的回忆！

活动主题与形式不限，只需符合学会的六大宗旨，并提倡文化、创新与团队精神即可。无论是文化活动、比赛、工作坊还是其他创意活动，我们都欢迎你的提案！

📌 投稿方式
请将计划书发送至： cls.mmu.cyber@gmail.com
计划书内容要求：活动简介、目标、预算、时间线等

📅 重要日期

计划书面试时段： 2026年4月22日（星期三） 至 2026年4月24日（星期五）

一起策划属于我们的精彩活动，让2026年更加丰富多彩！🌟

🎉 2026 Special Event Proposal Recruitment is Now Open!

Do you have exciting event ideas but never had the chance to make them happen? This is your opportunity! ✨
We welcome all creative members to submit 2026 special event proposals and turn your ideas into real events while creating meaningful experiences together.

The theme and format are open. Your proposal only needs to follow the society’s six principles and promote culture, innovation, and teamwork. Whether it is a cultural event, competition, workshop, or any creative activity, your ideas are welcome!

📌 Submission Method
Please send your proposal to: cls.mmu.cyber@gmail.com
Proposal Requirements: event introduction, objectives, budget, timeline, etc.

caption:
第二十九届会员福利 · 别再白白错过啦

你该不会真的只在报名活动的时候，才想起那张会员卡吧？
其实它更常出现在你吃饭、买饮料、日常走走停停的那些瞬间里。从校园内到校外，一点点被用掉的小优惠，慢慢就会变成你大学生活里最真实的“加分项”。

会员福利从来不只是活动优惠，它更像是一种默默陪你过日子的存在。
当你开始习惯带上它，你就会发现，这张卡比想象中更值得，也更常被用到。

福利有效期限：6/4/2026 - 12/3/2027
至于有哪些好康——就在海报上等你解锁，记得带上那张属于你的会员卡。👀

如有任何疑问，请联络：
谢紫欣 017-8724229

29th Membership Benefits · Don’t Let It Go to Waste

You're not just remembering your membership card when signing up for events… right? Honestly, it actually shows up way more in your everyday life — meals, drinks, and those little in-between moments around campus and beyond.

Those small perks might not seem like much at first, but they quietly add up and make your uni life a little smoother. Membership benefits aren’t just about events — they’re something you’ll find yourself using more often than you expected.

caption:
🌙✨ 开斋节快乐 · Selamat Hari Raya Aidilfitri ✨🌙

今天的空气，好像比平常多了一点香味。人们换上新衣，餐桌逐渐摆满佳肴，一句句“Maaf Zahir dan Batin”在手机讯息与笑声之间悄悄传递，团聚的气息也慢慢地铺满每一个角落。

一个月的修行与沉淀，让人学会耐心与温柔，也更懂得宽恕与珍惜。开斋节不只是庆祝斋戒的结束，更提醒我们带着澄澈的心重新出发，把不开心清零，把藏在心里的爱勇敢说出口。

在这充满灯火与欢笑的日子里，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会衷心祝愿大家回家有灯火相迎，餐桌有佳肴相伴，身边有笑声相随。愿你今年吃得满足、笑得真诚、爱得坦荡。

🌙✨ Happy Eid al-Fitr · Selamat Hari Raya Aidilfitri ✨🌙

Today, the air seems to carry a little more fragrance than usual. People put on new clothes, tables fill with festive dishes, and the greeting “Maaf Zahir dan Batin” is shared through messages and laughter as the joy of reunion slowly spreads everywhere.

After a month of reflection and devotion, Eid reminds us to move forward with patience, kindness, and forgiveness — to let go of what weighs on our hearts and to express the love we often keep unspoken.

On this joyful occasion, Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) sincerely wishes everyone a home filled with warmth, laughter, and togetherness. May you eat well, laugh sincerely, and love wholeheartedly.

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨祝您圣诞平安，幸福常在，前路顺遂！ 🎁

At the end of the year, Christmas adds warmth and meaning to the journey we have shared. 🎄

Looking back on 2025, we have grown through learning and companionship, creating many cherished memories. ✨May this Christmas bring peace, joy, and moments of calm as gratitude and goodwill accompany us in the days ahead. 🌟

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes you a peaceful Christmas and continued happiness! 🎁

caption:
🌕 冬至快乐 ❄️ 

期末再忙，生活再赶， 冬至还是值得慢下来的一天。 
也许是在宿舍和朋友一起吃一碗汤圆， 也许是隔着电话和家人聊几句近况， 这一天提醒我们的不只是节气， 更是一种“有人惦记，有人团圆”的感觉。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会在这个冬至， 祝大家身体安好、学业顺利。不管身在何处，都能感受到属于自己的那一份温暖。冬至时分，也别忘了好好照顾自己。

🌕 Happy Winter Solstice ❄️

No matter how busy the semester may be, Winter Solstice is still a day worth slowing down for.
It may be a simple moment shared with friends in the dormitory, or a brief phone call to catch up with family. More than just a solar term, this day reminds us of being remembered, and of togetherness.

On this Winter Solstice, Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes everyone good health and academic success. Wherever you may be, may you feel warmth and care, and may we remember to take good care of ourselves.

caption:
🌙✨ 开斋节快乐 · Selamat Hari Raya Aidilfitri ✨🌙

今天的空气，好像比平常多了一点香味。人们换上新衣，餐桌逐渐摆满佳肴，一句句“Maaf Zahir dan Batin”在手机讯息与笑声之间悄悄传递，团聚的气息也慢慢地铺满每一个角落。

一个月的修行与沉淀，让人学会耐心与温柔，也更懂得宽恕与珍惜。开斋节不只是庆祝斋戒的结束，更提醒我们带着澄澈的心重新出发，把不开心清零，把藏在心里的爱勇敢说出口。

在这充满灯火与欢笑的日子里，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会衷心祝愿大家回家有灯火相迎，餐桌有佳肴相伴，身边有笑声相随。愿你今年吃得满足、笑得真诚、爱得坦荡。

🌙✨ Happy Eid al-Fitr · Selamat Hari Raya Aidilfitri ✨🌙

Today, the air seems to carry a little more fragrance than usual. People put on new clothes, tables fill with festive dishes, and the greeting “Maaf Zahir dan Batin” is shared through messages and laughter as the joy of reunion slowly spreads everywhere.

After a month of reflection and devotion, Eid reminds us to move forward with patience, kindness, and forgiveness — to let go of what weighs on our hearts and to express the love we often keep unspoken.

On this joyful occasion, Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) sincerely wishes everyone a home filled with warmth, laughter, and togetherness. May you eat well, laugh sincerely, and love wholeheartedly.

caption:
你有没有想过—— 信任到底有多脆弱？
一句话、一个选择、一个眼神，都足以让信任化作锋利的刃。

在《信刃》的沉浸式推理 × 角色扮演旅程中， 每个人都握着属于自己的 “刀锋” ： 有人守护，有人怀疑，更有人在不经意间刺痛他人。
当信任开始破碎，你会站在哪一边呢？

多媒体大学（赛城）第二十八届华文学会外务团诚邀你走入《信刃》外校交流会的世界。你即将面对信任的试炼、选择的重量，也或许在矛盾与合作之间，找到新的连结与可能。

📅 日期：14/12/2025（星期日）
⏰ 时间：9am – 6pm
📍 地点：多媒体大学（赛城）
🎫 票价：单人 RM38 / 五人团购 RM175

🔗 玩家入场通道：
https://forms.gle/5bCQ1zwz6efmkH1j8

🔎 欲知更多详情，请联络：
☎️ 龚晴荔 011-60798623
☎️ 何宇航 012-2217231

Have you ever wondered— how fragile trust can be?
A single word, a choice, or even a glance is enough to turn trust into a sharp blade.

In “Trustedge”, an immersive mystery × role-playing journey, everyone carries their own “blade”: some protect, some doubt, and some hurt others without realising it.
When trust begins to break, which side will you choose to stand on?

The 28th External Affairs Division of MMU (Cyberjaya) invites you to enter the world of the  Inter-University Interaction Day: “Trustedge”. You will experience tests of trust and the impact of your choices, and you may find new connections and possibilities through both conflict and teamwork.

📅 Date: 14/12/2025 (Sunday)
⏰ Time: 9am - 6pm
📍 Venue: Multimedia University (Cyberjaya)
🎫 Ticket Price: RM38 each / RM175 for 5-pax combo

🔗 Player Entry Portal:
https://forms.gle/5bCQ1zwz6efmkH1j8

🔎 For more information, please contact:
☎️ Keng Jing Li 011-60798623
☎️ Ho Yu Hang 012-2217231

caption:
有前辈曾说：“铃声旋转，带走尘世的喧嚣，只留下心灵的澄澈。一抛一接之间，是力与美的交响，是青春的律动。”

加入扯铃班，只需要你的一点点勇气和满满的热情。在一次次甩动与旋转中，感受节奏的力量，释放青春的热爱，也让梦想随铃声延伸。🤩🤩

点击以下链接，把扯铃捧在手中，让热忱随旋转跃动。❤️❤️
https://forms.gle/xgrKVh1RB43hLA5u6 

对扯铃有兴趣的同学快来找我们吧！😆😆
加入扯铃班班委，一起把青春甩到天际！🌟

如有任何疑问，请联络：
蔡奕承 010-2437227

A senior once said: “The spinning of the diabolo carries away the noise of the world, leaving only clarity of the soul. In every toss and catch lies the symphony of strength and beauty, the rhythm of youth.”

Joining the Diabolo Class requires only a little courage and a great deal of passion. Every throw is a shout of youth; every spin is the extension of a dream. 🤩🤩

👉 Click the link below, hold the diabolo in your hands, and let passion come alive through every spin.❤️❤️
https://forms.gle/xgrKVh1RB43hLA5u6

If you’re interested in diabolo, come and find us! 😆😆
Be part of the Diabolo Class Committee and let us fling our youth to the skies together! 🌟

For any inquiries, kindly contact:
Chua Yi Cheng 010-2437227

caption:
你有没有想过—— 信任到底有多脆弱？
一句话、一个选择、一个眼神，都足以让信任化作锋利的刃。

在《信刃》的沉浸式推理 × 角色扮演旅程中， 每个人都握着属于自己的 “刀锋” ： 有人守护，有人怀疑，更有人在不经意间刺痛他人。
当信任开始破碎，你会站在哪一边呢？

多媒体大学（赛城）第二十八届华文学会外务团诚邀你走入《信刃》外校交流会的世界。你即将面对信任的试炼、选择的重量，也或许在矛盾与合作之间，找到新的连结与可能。

📅 日期：14/12/2025（星期日）
⏰ 时间：9am – 6pm
📍 地点：多媒体大学（赛城）
🎫 票价：单人 RM38 / 五人团购 RM175

🔗 玩家入场通道：
https://forms.gle/5bCQ1zwz6efmkH1j8

🔎 欲知更多详情，请联络：
☎️ 龚晴荔 011-60798623
☎️ 何宇航 012-2217231

Have you ever wondered— how fragile trust can be?
A single word, a choice, or even a glance is enough to turn trust into a sharp blade.

In “Trustedge”, an immersive mystery × role-playing journey, everyone carries their own “blade”: some protect, some doubt, and some hurt others without realising it.
When trust begins to break, which side will you choose to stand on?

The 28th External Affairs Division of MMU (Cyberjaya) invites you to enter the world of the  Inter-University Interaction Day: “Trustedge”. You will experience tests of trust and the impact of your choices, and you may find new connections and possibilities through both conflict and teamwork.

📅 Date: 14/12/2025 (Sunday)
⏰ Time: 9am - 6pm
📍 Venue: Multimedia University (Cyberjaya)
🎫 Ticket Price: RM38 each / RM175 for 5-pax combo

🔗 Player Entry Portal:
https://forms.gle/5bCQ1zwz6efmkH1j8

🔎 For more information, please contact:
☎️ Keng Jing Li 011-60798623
☎️ Ho Yu Hang 012-2217231
alt: Photo by 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会 on November 16, 2025.
ownerFullName: 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会

caption:
🌕 冬至快乐 ❄️ 

期末再忙，生活再赶， 冬至还是值得慢下来的一天。 
也许是在宿舍和朋友一起吃一碗汤圆， 也许是隔着电话和家人聊几句近况， 这一天提醒我们的不只是节气， 更是一种“有人惦记，有人团圆”的感觉。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会在这个冬至， 祝大家身体安好、学业顺利。不管身在何处，都能感受到属于自己的那一份温暖。冬至时分，也别忘了好好照顾自己。

🌕 Happy Winter Solstice ❄️

No matter how busy the semester may be, Winter Solstice is still a day worth slowing down for.
It may be a simple moment shared with friends in the dormitory, or a brief phone call to catch up with family. More than just a solar term, this day reminds us of being remembered, and of togetherness.

On this Winter Solstice, Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes everyone good health and academic success. Wherever you may be, may you feel warmth and care, and may we remember to take good care of ourselves.
alt: Photo by 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会 on December 20, 2025.
ownerFullName: 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会

caption:
📢【2026特别活动计划书招收启动！】📢

想让你的创意化为现实？
想为校园增添一份文化色彩与青春活力？
机会来了！✨

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会现正式开放特别活动计划书招收！
无论是文化活动、学术讲座、艺术展演或社会关怀，只要你有想法、有热情，我们都欢迎你的提案！💡

🎯 我们期待的，是：
让校园更温暖的活动、
让文化更鲜活的点子、
让每个成员都能发光的舞台。

📌【招收详情】
🗓️ 提交日期：即日起至 11月23日
📍 提交方式：发送至官方电邮 cls.mmu.cyber@gmail.com
📄 提交内容：活动简介、目标、预算、时间线等
📬计划书面试时间：26/11/2025 - 28/11/2025
📅活动筹备期：2024年12月至2025年5月

让我们携手策划属于华文学会的精彩篇章，用创意与热情，共同书写下一个闪耀的故事！✨

策划由你，精彩由我们。

📢 [2026 Special Event Proposal Submission is Now Open!] 📢

Want to turn your creativity into reality?
Want to bring cultural vibrancy and youthful energy to our campus?
Here’s your chance! ✨

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) is now officially open for Special Event Proposal Submissions!
Whether it’s a cultural event, academic seminar, artistic performance, or community outreach — as long as you have ideas and passion, we welcome your proposal! 💡

🎯 We’re looking for:
Events that bring warmth to our campus,
Ideas that breathe new life into culture, 
And platforms where every member can shine.

📌 Submission Details
🗓️ Submission Period: From now until 23 November 2025
📍 Submission Method: Send to cls.mmu.cyber@gmail.com
📄 Required Contents: Event introduction, objectives, budget, and timeline
📬 Proposal Interview Dates: 26 – 28 November 2025
📅 Event Preparation Period: December 2025 – May 2026

Let’s join hands to create another remarkable chapter for the Chinese Language Society — with creativity, dedication, and passion, let’s make brilliance together! ✨

Your Ideas, Our Inspiration.

caption:
🇲🇾 Selamat Hari Malaysia 🌺

9月16日，我们迎来了第62个马来西亚日。

它不仅是一个历史时刻，更是一份提醒：不论来自东马 🏞️ 还是西马 🌇，不论种族、语言与信仰 👫🌏，我们都共同编织着属于马来西亚的故事 📜。

让我们继续携手守护这片多元与和谐的土地 🌳，一同迈向更加团结、进步与繁荣的未来 🚀🌟。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨此祝福全体马来西亚人民：
马来西亚日快乐 🇲🇾 愿国泰民安 🕊️，人民安康 💖！

🇲🇾 Happy Malaysia Day 🌺

16th September, we celebrate the 62nd Malaysia Day.

Malaysia Day is more than just a historic event — it is a reminder that regardless of East Malaysia 🏞️ or West Malaysia 🌇, of race, language, or faith 👫🌏, we all share the same Malaysian identity and future📜.

May we continue to uphold unity, harmony, and diversity 🌳 as we journey towards a stronger and more prosperous nation 🚀✨.

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes all Malaysians a very Happy Malaysia Day 🇲🇾💖!
alt: Photo by 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会 on September 15, 2025.
ownerFullName: 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会

caption:
🇲🇾 国庆日快乐！ 🎉

辉煌六十八载，马来西亚走过了风雨与挑战，却始终以团结的力量、坚韧的精神，书写属于我们的光辉篇章。✨

在这值得铭记的日子里，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨向全体国人致以崇高的敬意与祝福。愿大马继续稳步前行，繁荣昌盛，让国旗在世世代代的守护下，永远高高飘扬！🇲🇾

🇲🇾 Happy Independence Day! 🎉

For 68 glorious years, Malaysia has weathered challenges and embraced triumphs, forging ahead with unity, resilience, and unwavering spirit. ✨

On this day of remembrance and celebration, the Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) extends our heartfelt respect and best wishes to all Malaysians. May our beloved nation continue to prosper, and may the Jalur Gemilang fly proudly for generations to come! 🇲🇾

caption:
月圆人团圆，心中共此时。
在这象征团聚与思念的时刻，
明月承载着无尽的祝福，
照亮每一颗思念的心。
多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会
祝愿大家中秋快乐，阖家幸福，万事圆满。

As the moon reaches its fullness, hearts come together as one.
In this moment of reunion and reflection,
the bright moon carries blessings of love and warmth,
illuminating every heart with joy and peace.
The Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya)
extends our heartfelt wishes for a joyous and fulfilling Mid-Autumn Festival.

照亮每一颗思念的心。
多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会
祝愿大家中秋快乐，阖家幸福，万事圆满。

As the moon reaches its fullness, hearts come together as one.
In this moment of reunion and reflection,
the bright moon carries blessings of love and warmth,
illuminating every heart with joy and peace.
The Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya)
extends our heartfelt wishes for a joyous and fulfilling Mid-Autumn Festival.

caption:
致：全体会员们💖

时光荏苒，第28届华文学会已随着2025年12月15日举行的常年会员大会顺利落幕，圆满划下句点。感谢大家在这一届对学会的陪伴、支持与信任。
也希望大家继续给予即将展开的新一届华文学会同样的鼓励与支持。来年我们将推出更多精彩丰富的活动，期待与大家再次相见与参与🙆
谢谢大家！✨

“资讯科技主力，中华文化先锋”

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会
谨启

To: All CLSC Members💖

Time flies, and with the successful completion of the Annual General Meeting held on 15 December 2025, the 28th Chinese Language Society has officially come to a wonderful close. Thank you all for your continuous support, trust and encouragement throughout this term.
We hope everyone will continue to support the upcoming new committee as well. A variety of exciting activities will be waiting for you next year, so please look forward to them 🙆
Thank you!✨

“Leader of Information Technology, Pioneer of Chinese Culture”

Regards,
Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya)

In the story of your university life, will there be a chapter where you create the moment? 
This time, you’re not just joining the event — you’re helping shape it.

We are looking for dreamers, doers, and team players — people who aren’t afraid to bring ideas to life and make memories that last.

ownerFullName: 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会

caption:
二十八啦！🎉
不是岁月让我们老去，而是青春让我们一直闪亮。✨

二十八年来，华文学会陪伴一批又一批的小伙伴，从懵懂到勇敢，从相遇到并肩。这里有笑声，有汗水，有一起疯狂的日子，也有彼此支持的瞬间。💪

28 岁，对我们来说，不是结束，而是新的开始。🔥
未来，还有更多故事等着我们去创造！🚀

生日快乐，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会！🎂
让青春继续发光，让热爱永远燃烧！❤️

We're 28! 🎉
It's not the years that define us, but the passion that keeps us shining. ✨

For 28 years, the Chinese Language Society has been a place where strangers become teammates, where laughter mixes with sweat, and where every crazy moment becomes an unforgettable memory. 💪

28 isn't the end—it's the start of a brand-new chapter. 🔥
The future is wide open, and we're ready to create more stories together! 🚀

Happy 28th Birthday, Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya)! 🎂
Here's to endless youth, endless passion, and endless possibilities! ❤️

caption:
📢【2026特别活动计划书招收启动！】📢

想让你的创意化为现实？
想为校园增添一份文化色彩与青春活力？
机会来了！✨

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会现正式开放特别活动计划书招收！
无论是文化活动、学术讲座、艺术展演或社会关怀，只要你有想法、有热情，我们都欢迎你的提案！💡

🎯 我们期待的，是：
让校园更温暖的活动、
让文化更鲜活的点子、
让每个成员都能发光的舞台。

📌【招收详情】
🗓️ 提交日期：即日起至 11月23日
📍 提交方式：发送至官方电邮 cls.mmu.cyber@gmail.com
📄 提交内容：活动简介、目标、预算、时间线等
📬计划书面试时间：26/11/2025 - 28/11/2025
📅活动筹备期：2024年12月至2025年5月

让我们携手策划属于华文学会的精彩篇章，用创意与热情，共同书写下一个闪耀的故事！✨

策划由你，精彩由我们。

📢 [2026 Special Event Proposal Submission is Now Open!] 📢

Want to turn your creativity into reality?
Want to bring cultural vibrancy and youthful energy to our campus?
Here’s your chance! ✨

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) is now officially open for Special Event Proposal Submissions!
Whether it’s a cultural event, academic seminar, artistic performance, or community outreach — as long as you have ideas and passion, we welcome your proposal! 💡

🎯 We’re looking for:
Events that bring warmth to our campus,
Ideas that breathe new life into culture, 
And platforms where every member can shine.

📌 Submission Details
🗓️ Submission Period: From now until 23 November 2025
📍 Submission Method: Send to cls.mmu.cyber@gmail.com
📄 Required Contents: Event introduction, objectives, budget, and timeline
📬 Proposal Interview Dates: 26 – 28 November 2025
📅 Event Preparation Period: December 2025 – May 2026

Let’s join hands to create another remarkable chapter for the Chinese Language Society — with creativity, dedication, and passion, let’s make brilliance together! ✨

Your Ideas, Our Inspiration.

caption:
第二十八届迎新活动筹委会开始招收啦！

在大学生活的篇章中，有没有一段属于你的热血故事？ 
这一次，不只是参与者，你也可以是策划者、创造者、梦想的点燃者。

我们正在寻找一群愿意一起疯、一起拼的你们。 
在这里，你可以挥洒创意，磨练能力，更能找到一群志同道合的伙伴。

不论你是否有经验，只要你： 
- 对活动充满热情 
- 喜欢团队合作 
- 想让大学生活不留遗憾 

那就勇敢跨出这一步，我们在这里等你。

报名截止日期：2025年8月24日（星期日） 
报名链接：https://forms.gle/AFSFQbUzaEuyhEcz7

如有任何疑问，请联系： 
邓伟信 017-5002968 
谢紫欣 017-8724229 
洪语恒 016-3532202

Join the 28th Orientation Event Organising Committee!

In the story of your university life, will there be a chapter where you create the moment? 
This time, you’re not just joining the event — you’re helping shape it.

We are looking for dreamers, doers, and team players — people who aren’t afraid to bring ideas to life and make memories that last.

No prior experience? No worries. All you need is: 
- Passion for planning and creating 
- Willingness to work with others 
- The courage to try something new

Take the leap. You might just surprise yourself.

Recruitment Deadline: 24th August 2025 (Sunday) 
Application Link: https://forms.gle/AFSFQbUzaEuyhEcz7

For any inquiries, please contact:
Tang Wel Son 017-5002968
Chia Zhi Sin 017-8724229
Ang Yee Hern 016-3532202
alt: Photo by 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会 on August 17, 2025.
ownerFullName: 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会

caption:
👔父亲节快乐💙
在岁月的长河中，父亲的爱如山般沉稳，不言不语，却始终是我们最坚实的依靠。他以肩膀撑起一个家，以沉默诠释深沉的情感。

在这个感恩的日子里，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会向天下所有父亲献上最诚挚的祝福：
愿每一位父亲健康平安，笑容常在；
愿子女的成长与感恩，成为他们最骄傲的回报。

谢谢您——用一生诠释责任与担当，
在我们心中，您永远是最伟大的英雄。🛠️💖

👔Happy Father’s Day💙
He may not always speak his love, but a father‘s care is steady like a mountain — silent, strong, and unwavering. He carries the weight of the family on his shoulders, expressing love through quiet dedication.

On this day of gratitude, Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) extends our heartfelt wishes to all fathers:
May every father be blessed with health, peace, and lasting happiness.
May the growth and gratitude of their children become their greatest pride.

Thank you—for a lifetime of strength, sacrifice, and silent love.
In our hearts, you will always be the greatest hero. 🛠️💖
alt: Photo by 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会 on June 14, 2025.
ownerFullName: 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会

caption:
🔥 马六甲·赛城 交流会 🌱
2025年5月11日，第28届多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会受邀出席由多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会主办的交流会，并圆满落幕。

衷心感谢多媒体大学（马六甲院校）华文学会的热情招待与用心安排，让我们收获满满、交流愉快。

愿这份跨校情谊长存，期待未来有更多合作与交流的机会！

🔥 Melaka·Cyberjaya Interaction Camp 🌱
On 11 May 2025, the 28th Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) was honored to attend the interaction camp hosted by Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Melaka).

A heartfelt thank you to Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Melaka) for the warm hospitality and thoughtful arrangements. It was a meaningful and enjoyable experience for all of us.

We look forward to continuing this cherished bond and to more collaborations in the future!

caption:
✨An art experience that’s more than just “Insta-worthy”!
Have you ever imagined art you can listen to, touch, or even take home? 🎧🖐🎁This September, we’re bringing something refreshingly different to KL Gateway Mall!

No boring galleries or serious lectures — Only fun, hands-on experiences you can truly enjoy!
👀 See bold and thoughtful works by young creatives
🛍  Find cute and creative merchandise from local artists
🪄 Join workshops and spark new ideas
💡 Visit our creative market filled with passionate people and original creations

This time, we invite YOU to explore, express, and discover something new ✨

📅 Event Dates : 06/09/2025 (Saturday) – 07/09/2025 (Sunday)
⏰ Event Time : 10AM – 8PM
📍 Event Venue : KL Gateway Mall, Jalan Kerinchi, Kuala Lumpur, Selangor, Malaysia

🌟Where there is light, there is a story.
Come and turn your passion into something that shines ✨
🔗 Get your tickets now: https://fleetinglight.art/ticket

For any inquiries, contact:
☎️ Calvin Ser Ying Hou: 014-9817101
☎️ Gillian Tiong Shaw Hui: 011-21861128

✨一场不止“打卡”的艺术体验！你有没有想过——艺术可以听、可以玩、可以带回家？🎧🖐🎁这个9月，我们在KL Gateway Mall搞点不一样的！

这里没有高高在上的艺术讲堂，只有可以感受、可以碰、可以笑的真实体验！
👀看见青春的躁动与思考
🛍遇见趣味周边和小巧玩意
🪄在工作坊里收获一份灵感火花
💡创意市集上，有灵魂又有趣的人和作品在等你！

这一次，
我们期待和你一起，发现更多可能 ✨

📅活动日期 ：06/09/2025（星期六）- 07/09/2025（星期日）
⏰活动时间 ：10AM - 8PM
📍活动地点 ：KL Gateway Mall, Jalan Kerinchi, Kuala Lumpur, Selangor, Malaysia

有光的地方，就有故事。
我们等你来，把热爱变成一道灵感的光 ✨
🔗立即购票：https://fleetinglight.art/ticket

如有任何疑问，请联络：
☎️徐英皓 014-9817101
☎️张守蕙 011-21861128

caption:
📢【2026特别活动计划书招收启动！】📢

想让你的创意化为现实？
想为校园增添一份文化色彩与青春活力？
机会来了！✨

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会现正式开放特别活动计划书招收！
无论是文化活动、学术讲座、艺术展演或社会关怀，只要你有想法、有热情，我们都欢迎你的提案！💡

🎯 我们期待的，是：
让校园更温暖的活动、
让文化更鲜活的点子、
让每个成员都能发光的舞台。

📌【招收详情】
🗓️ 提交日期：即日起至 11月23日
📍 提交方式：发送至官方电邮 cls.mmu.cyber@gmail.com
📄 提交内容：活动简介、目标、预算、时间线等
📬计划书面试时间：26/11/2025 - 28/11/2025
📅活动筹备期：2024年12月至2025年5月

让我们携手策划属于华文学会的精彩篇章，用创意与热情，共同书写下一个闪耀的故事！✨

策划由你，精彩由我们。

📢 [2026 Special Event Proposal Submission is Now Open!] 📢

Want to turn your creativity into reality?
Want to bring cultural vibrancy and youthful energy to our campus?
Here’s your chance! ✨

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) is now officially open for Special Event Proposal Submissions!
Whether it’s a cultural event, academic seminar, artistic performance, or community outreach — as long as you have ideas and passion, we welcome your proposal! 💡

🎯 We’re looking for:
Events that bring warmth to our campus,
Ideas that breathe new life into culture, 
And platforms where every member can shine.

📌 Submission Details
🗓️ Submission Period: From now until 23 November 2025
📍 Submission Method: Send to cls.mmu.cyber@gmail.com
📄 Required Contents: Event introduction, objectives, budget, and timeline
📬 Proposal Interview Dates: 26 – 28 November 2025
📅 Event Preparation Period: December 2025 – May 2026

Let’s join hands to create another remarkable chapter for the Chinese Language Society — with creativity, dedication, and passion, let’s make brilliance together! ✨

Your Ideas, Our Inspiration.

This time, we invite YOU to explore, express, and discover something new ✨

📅 Event Dates : 06/09/2025 (Saturday) – 07/09/2025 (Sunday)
⏰ Event Time : 10AM – 8PM
📍 Event Venue : KL Gateway Mall, Jalan Kerinchi, Kuala Lumpur, Selangor, Malaysia

🌟Where there is light, there is a story.
Come and turn your passion into something that shines ✨
🔗 Get your tickets now: https://fleetinglight.art/ticket

For any inquiries, contact:
☎️ Calvin Ser Ying Hou: 014-9817101
☎️ Gillian Tiong Shaw Hui: 011-21861128

✨一场不止“打卡”的艺术体验！你有没有想过——艺术可以听、可以玩、可以带回家？🎧🖐🎁这个9月，我们在KL Gateway Mall搞点不一样的！

这里没有高高在上的艺术讲堂，只有可以感受、可以碰、可以笑的真实体验！
👀看见青春的躁动与思考
🛍遇见趣味周边和小巧玩意
🪄在工作坊里收获一份灵感火花
💡创意市集上，有灵魂又有趣的人和作品在等你！

这一次，
我们期待和你一起，发现更多可能 ✨

📅活动日期 ：06/09/2025（星期六）- 07/09/2025（星期日）
⏰活动时间 ：10AM - 8PM
📍活动地点 ：KL Gateway Mall, Jalan Kerinchi, Kuala Lumpur, Selangor, Malaysia

有光的地方，就有故事。
我们等你来，把热爱变成一道灵感的光 ✨
🔗立即购票：https://fleetinglight.art/ticket

如有任何疑问，请联络：
☎️徐英皓 014-9817101
☎️张守蕙 011-21861128

ownerFullName: 艺术展《瞬息临光》 Creatives Expo: Fleeting Light

caption:
🐉 粽香四溢，端午安康！

又是一年端午节，粽叶包的不只是糯米，还有思念与情感；龙舟划的不只是浪花，还有传承与精神。

在这个承载文化的节日里，让我们一起感受那份“粽”有温度的祝福～

愿你：
🍃 工作不太卷，生活刚刚好
🍙 粽子不粘牙，好运天天粘
💚 忙碌之中，也别忘了给自己一份节日的小确幸

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会祝大家端午节快乐，心意安康，“粽”享幸福！

🎋 Happy Dragon Boat Festival! 🐉

As the scent of bamboo leaves fills the air, we welcome a festival wrapped in tradition, culture, and care.

The dumplings we enjoy aren’t just filled with glutinous rice — they’re filled with stories, warmth, and love.
The dragon boats don’t just race on water — they carry the spirit of unity, strength, and perseverance.

On this special day, we wish you:
🌿 Peace in your heart, even when life gets busy
🍙 Dumplings that stick (just like good luck!)
💚 Sweetness in your days, even without dessert

Take a moment to slow down and enjoy the traditions that bring us together. CLS MMU (Cyberjaya) wishing you joy, health, and a peaceful Dragon Boat Festival!

ownerFullName: 艺术展《瞬息临光》 Creatives Expo: Fleeting Light

caption:
二十八啦！🎉
不是岁月让我们老去，而是青春让我们一直闪亮。✨

二十八年来，华文学会陪伴一批又一批的小伙伴，从懵懂到勇敢，从相遇到并肩。这里有笑声，有汗水，有一起疯狂的日子，也有彼此支持的瞬间。💪

28 岁，对我们来说，不是结束，而是新的开始。🔥
未来，还有更多故事等着我们去创造！🚀

生日快乐，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会！🎂
让青春继续发光，让热爱永远燃烧！❤️

We're 28! 🎉
It's not the years that define us, but the passion that keeps us shining. ✨

For 28 years, the Chinese Language Society has been a place where strangers become teammates, where laughter mixes with sweat, and where every crazy moment becomes an unforgettable memory. 💪

28 isn't the end—it's the start of a brand-new chapter. 🔥
The future is wide open, and we're ready to create more stories together! 🚀

Happy 28th Birthday, Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya)! 🎂
Here's to endless youth, endless passion, and endless possibilities! ❤️
alt: Photo by 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会 on August 27, 2025.
ownerFullName: 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会

caption:
🇲🇾 Selamat Hari Malaysia 🌺

9月16日，我们迎来了第62个马来西亚日。

它不仅是一个历史时刻，更是一份提醒：不论来自东马 🏞️ 还是西马 🌇，不论种族、语言与信仰 👫🌏，我们都共同编织着属于马来西亚的故事 📜。

让我们继续携手守护这片多元与和谐的土地 🌳，一同迈向更加团结、进步与繁荣的未来 🚀🌟。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨此祝福全体马来西亚人民：
马来西亚日快乐 🇲🇾 愿国泰民安 🕊️，人民安康 💖！

🇲🇾 Happy Malaysia Day 🌺

16th September, we celebrate the 62nd Malaysia Day.

Malaysia Day is more than just a historic event — it is a reminder that regardless of East Malaysia 🏞️ or West Malaysia 🌇, of race, language, or faith 👫🌏, we all share the same Malaysian identity and future📜.

May we continue to uphold unity, harmony, and diversity 🌳 as we journey towards a stronger and more prosperous nation 🚀✨.

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes all Malaysians a very Happy Malaysia Day 🇲🇾💖!

caption:
🪷 卫塞节快乐 🪷

卫塞节，又称佛诞日，是纪念佛陀诞生、成道与涅槃的重要日子。这是一个属于和平、觉悟与感恩的节日。在这庄严而祥和的日子里，让我们放下执念，行善积德，怀抱慈悲之心。🕊️

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨祝愿大家——卫塞节快乐，愿你我皆得清净安宁，智慧常在。

🪷 Happy Vesak Day 🪷

Vesak Day marks the birth, enlightenment, and passing of Lord Buddha —a sacred occasion symbolizing peace, compassion, and spiritual awakening.On this meaningful day,let us embrace kindness, reflect inwardly, and practice goodwill. 🕯️

The Chinese Language Society of Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) sincerely wishes you a joyful and serene Vesak Day.May your heart be filled with light, wisdom, and tranquility.

alt: Photo by 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会 on May 11, 2025.
ownerFullName: 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会

caption:
母亲节🌷致敬平凡中的伟大🌷

母亲，是世界上最温柔且坚韧的角色。✨她们用岁月诠释无私，以行动守护家庭。母爱无需华丽辞藻，它早已深深植于我们生命的点滴之中。

在这特别的日子里，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨向全天下的母亲致以最崇高的敬意与谢意。🥰

愿所有母亲健康平安、笑容常在，岁月温柔待你，正如你温柔待我们。

💓母亲节快乐💓 

Mother’s Day🌷Honouring Greatness in the Ordinary🌷

A mother embodies both gentleness and strength. ✨ Through time, she teaches us selflessness,and through quiet sacrifice, she holds families together. Motherly love needs no grand declaration, it is found in every small moment, every silent act of care.

On this meaningful occasion, the Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) extends its deepest respect and gratitude to all mothers.🥰

May all mothers be blessed with good health, lasting joy,and the warmth they have so selflessly given to others.

💓Happy Mother’s Day💓

在这特别的日子里，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨向全天下的母亲致以最崇高的敬意与谢意。🥰

愿所有母亲健康平安、笑容常在，岁月温柔待你，正如你温柔待我们。

💓母亲节快乐💓 

Mother’s Day🌷Honouring Greatness in the Ordinary🌷

A mother embodies both gentleness and strength. ✨ Through time, she teaches us selflessness,and through quiet sacrifice, she holds families together. Motherly love needs no grand declaration, it is found in every small moment, every silent act of care.

On this meaningful occasion, the Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) extends its deepest respect and gratitude to all mothers.🥰

May all mothers be blessed with good health, lasting joy,and the warmth they have so selflessly given to others.

💓Happy Mother’s Day💓

caption:
五一劳动节⚡向每一份辛勤付出致敬🫡

在这个属于劳动者的日子里，我们向每一位默默付出、坚持耕耘的你致以最真诚的敬意。 
愿所有努力都不被辜负，所有汗水终有收获。 
不管是奔波的脚步，还是选择休息的片刻，都值得被尊重与珍惜。

🎊多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会在此祝大家五一劳动节快乐，身心安康，所愿皆成。🎊

Labor Day⚡A Tribute to Every Hardworking Soul🫡

On this day dedicated to all who work with heart and hands, we salute your dedication, perseverance, and every silent effort made. 
May your hard work bear fruit, and may your journey be filled with meaning. 
Whether you‘re hustling or taking a well-deserved break today, you deserve respect, rest, and recognition.

🎊Wishing you a joyful and peaceful Labor Day from the Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya).🎊

ownerFullName: 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会

caption:
🌸 清明节 | Qingming Festival 🌿

清明时节，微风拂面，仿佛诉说着遥远的思念。在这片春意盎然的天地中，微风带来的不仅是花草的芳香，更是对逝去亲人的深情牵挂。每一次风的轻拂，都是一段回忆的呢喃，是心中那份永不褪色的情感。 

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会谨此于清明节献上最真挚的祝福。愿思念化作温柔的风，传达我们的敬意与缅怀；愿记忆如新芽般永远鲜活，带来无尽的希望与力量。 

During the Qingming Festival, the gentle breeze brushing against your face feels like a whisper of longing. Amidst the vibrant renewal of spring, the breeze carries not only the fragrance of blossoms and grass but also the enduring affection for those who have departed. Every touch of the wind is like a soft murmur of memories, a tribute to love that time can never fade. 

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) extends sincerest wishes this Qingming Festival. May our remembrance be carried by the gentle wind, conveying our respect and longing. May our memories remain evergreen, bringing endless hope and strength.

caption:

🌐 汇聚学生、创作者与业界人士的灵感火花。
💕 敬请期待，成为这道光的一部分。

A flash of light. A moment of creativity. A story waiting to be told. Creatives Expo: Fleeting Light is coming your way this September 2025!

📸 Celebrate photography, storytelling & digital artistry.
🌐 Uniting students, creatives, and industry minds.
💕 Stay tuned. Be part of the light.

caption:
✨开斋节快乐！🌙💫

开斋节象征着内心的净化、重生与希望的绽放。在这充满感恩与宽恕的日子里，我们真诚祝愿大家与家人团聚，共享喜悦与温暖。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会愿和谐与幸福伴随在你们左右，愿爱与包容的精神延续在每一个日子里。无论身处何地，我们的祝福始终与你同在。💖🌼

✨Happy Eid al-Fitr! 🌙💫

Eid al-Fitr symbolizes inner purification, renewal, and the blossoming of hope. On this day filled with gratitude and forgiveness, we sincerely wish everyone a joyous reunion with your loved ones, sharing happiness and warmth.

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes that harmony and happiness stay with you always, and may the spirit of love and compassion continue throughout each day. No matter where you are, our blessings are always with you. 💖🌼
alt: Photo by 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会 on March 31, 2025.
ownerFullName: 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会

caption:
✨🌸 大宝森节快乐! 🌸✨

大宝森节是一个象征信仰、奉献与精神升华的节日。每一年，我们都会看到虔诚的信徒怀着感恩之心，通过祈福、游行以及各种传统仪式来表达对神明的敬意。在这个特别的日子里，我们不仅见证了宗教的力量，也感受到文化多样性所带来的美好与和谐。 

让我们一同庆祝大宝森节，尊重与欣赏彼此的文化，传递爱与希望。多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会愿大家在这充满祝福的时节中收获平安、健康与幸福，心想事成！ 

✨🌸 Happy Thaipusam! 🌸✨

Thaipusam is a festival that symbolizes devotion, faith, and spiritual renewal. Every year, we witness devoted worshippers offering prayers, participating in processions, and performing rituals to express gratitude to the deities. This sacred celebration not only highlights the power of faith but also showcases the beauty of cultural diversity and unity. 

Let us come together to celebrate Thaipusam with respect and appreciation for one another‘s traditions, spreading love and positivity. Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishing everyone peace, good health, and happiness this festive season!

caption:
🌟 生活营筹委招募 | 这一刻，等的就是你！🌟

💡 加入我们，你将收获：
✨ 满满成就感——从零开始策划，亲手打造一场属于你的精彩！
🎭 团队协作体验——和一群有趣的人并肩作战，培养组织与沟通能力！
🚀 技能大提升——活动策划、危机处理、宣传推广，统统Get！
🌍 人脉资源拓展——结识来自不同领域的优秀伙伴，建立深厚友谊与合作关系！

无论你是策划新手还是活动达人，只要你有热情、有想法，生活营就是你大展身手的机会！🔥

🔎筹委招收详情如下：
📍招收时段: 2025年3月24日 （星期一） 至2025年4月4日 （星期五）
📍面试时段: 2025年4月8日（星期二） 至 2025年4月10日 （星期四）
📍面试时间和地点: 另行通知

扫描二维码或点击以下链接，以了解本次生活营筹委团招募的各个岗位。最后，点击页面底部的按钮填写表格，我们将根据你的兴趣和专长，为你匹配最合适的职位，让你在最适合的岗位上发光发热！💡

🌟 Life Camp Organizing Committee Recruitment | This is your moment! 🌟

💡 Why join us?
✨ Sense of accomplishment – Plan an event from scratch and bring your vision to life!
🎭 Teamwork & collaboration – Work alongside a fun and dynamic team, enhancing your communication and leadership skills!
🚀 Skill development – Gain hands-on experience in event planning, problem-solving, and marketing!
🌍 Networking opportunities – Meet and connect with talented individuals from various backgrounds!

Whether you're a first-time organizer or an experienced planner, if you have passion and ideas, Life Camp is the perfect opportunity for you! 🔥

🔍Information of organizing committee recruitment is stated below：
📍Application Period:  24th March 2025 (Monday) to 4th April 2025 (Friday)

Scan the QR code or click the website link below to explore the available positions for the Life Camp Organizing Committee recruitment. caption:
☘️理事会☘️

大家好，我们是多媒体大学（赛城）第二十八届理事会。

在未来的一年中，我们将会关注学会小组小班的发展，并以此为根基向外拓展。在与其他组织建立联系的同时，我们也会进一步向会员们传播学会的价值观，以促进学会的全面发展。

“资讯科技主力，中华文化先锋”

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会
第二十八届理事会 谨启

☘️ Executive Council ☘️

Hello everyone, we are the 28th executive council of the Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya).

In the coming year, we will focus on the development of small groups and classes within our society, using them as a foundation for further expansion. While establishing connections with other organizations, we will also continue to promote our society’s values among our members to facilitate its overall growth.

“Leader of Information Technology, Pioneer of Chinese Culture”

Regards,
28th Executive Council
Chinese Language Society
Multimedia University (Cyberjaya)

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes that harmony and happiness stay with you always, and may the spirit of love and compassion continue throughout each day. No matter where you are, our blessings are always with you. 💖🌼

caption:
✨🌸 大宝森节快乐! 🌸✨

大宝森节是一个象征信仰、奉献与精神升华的节日。每一年，我们都会看到虔诚的信徒怀着感恩之心，通过祈福、游行以及各种传统仪式来表达对神明的敬意。在这个特别的日子里，我们不仅见证了宗教的力量，也感受到文化多样性所带来的美好与和谐。 

让我们一同庆祝大宝森节，尊重与欣赏彼此的文化，传递爱与希望。多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会愿大家在这充满祝福的时节中收获平安、健康与幸福，心想事成！ 

✨🌸 Happy Thaipusam! 🌸✨

Thaipusam is a festival that symbolizes devotion, faith, and spiritual renewal. Every year, we witness devoted worshippers offering prayers, participating in processions, and performing rituals to express gratitude to the deities. This sacred celebration not only highlights the power of faith but also showcases the beauty of cultural diversity and unity. 

Let us come together to celebrate Thaipusam with respect and appreciation for one another‘s traditions, spreading love and positivity. Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishing everyone peace, good health, and happiness this festive season!

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会愿和谐与幸福伴随在你们左右，愿爱与包容的精神延续在每一个日子里。无论身处何地，我们的祝福始终与你同在。💖🌼

caption:
🎇🐍 迎接丰收的蛇年，愿新春万象更新！🎇

2025年为乙巳年，也称为蛇年。蛇在中华文化中象征智慧、灵活和魅力。今年，让我们像蛇一样聪慧果断，灵活应对生活中的每个挑战！🤩

🌸 在这充满希望与喜悦的时刻，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会祝您：
新年快乐，吉祥如意！
家庭和睦，事业兴旺！
身体健康，万事顺心！

🌟 感谢您的支持，愿我们在新的一年继续携手前行，共创美好未来！

✨🐍 Welcome the prosperous Year of the Snake with renewed hope and joy! ✨

The year 2025 marks the Year of the Snake in the Chinese zodiac. The snake represents wisdom, agility, and charm in Chinese culture. May we embrace the new year with intelligence and grace, overcoming challenges with confidence! 🤩

🌸 On this festive occasion, Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes you:
A Happy and Prosperous New Year!
Harmony in your family and success in your endeavors!
Good health and happiness in all that you do!

🌟 Thank you for your support. May we continue to work together for a brighter future in the coming year!

caption:
✨捕捉春节之美，共享节日喜悦！✨

农历新年即将到来，诚邀您参与”新春摄影比赛”！用您的镜头记录属于农历新年的美好瞬间，无论是充满故事感的人物，还是洋溢节日气氛的景色，都期待您的精彩呈现！

📅开放时间：2025年1月23日（星期四）至 2025年2月13日（星期四）
📤提交方式：请将参赛作品及作品简介上传至指定的Google Form
🔗链接：https://forms.gle/musA4jTUqVkCWW4H7

🎯摄影主题：农历新年
作品可以是生动的人物，温馨的家庭团聚，或节日气息浓郁的风景等，主题不限，只需传递浓郁的新春氛围即可！

📷用镜头讲述新春故事，期待您的作品大放异彩！

✨ Capture the Beauty of the New Year and Share the Festive Joy!✨

As the Lunar New Year approaches, we warmly invite you to participate in the Extravaganza “Serpent”- Lunar New Year Spring Festival Photography Contest!🏮 Use your lens to capture the wonderful moments of the Lunar New Year, whether it’s storytelling portraits or festive scenery, we look forward to your outstanding entries!

📅Submission Period: 23rd January 2025 (Thursday) to 13th February 2025 (Thursday)
📤Submission Method: Please upload your entry and a brief description of your work via the designated Google Form.
🔗Link:https://forms.gle/musA4jTUqVkCWW4H7

🎯Photography Theme: Lunar New Year
Your work can feature dynamic portraits, warm family reunions or scenery filled with festive vibes. There are no restrictions on the theme, as long as it conveys a rich Lunar New Year atmosphere!

📷Tell your New Year story through your lens, and we look forward to seeing your outstanding work!

Ready to turn your creative ideas into reality?

caption:
🌟 你想认识更多志同道合的朋友吗？想要在大学生活中留下更难忘的回忆吗？外务团等你来！

🎯 外务团是什么？
外务团成立于2022年12月11日，主要是协助外务副主席处理学会的外交事务，包括：
* 接待访问校园的外校学生团体
* 宣传华文学会的精彩活动
* 参与其他学校的活动，与更多人建立联系

🎮 适合加入外务团的你：
* 热爱社交，喜欢与人交流
* 想认识更多朋友（也许还能遇见命中注定的人哦！）
* 渴望积累活动经验，提升组织能力
* 或者只是觉得无聊，想给大学生活增添点不一样的色彩
不管你有没有以上特征，我们都欢迎你的加入！

别再犹豫啦，赶快点击链接填写表格，让我们一起创造属于外务团的精彩故事吧！
🔗 报名链接： https://forms.gle/3vfyExoSYYmF7Dg98
⏰ 报名截止日期： 10/2/2025 （星期一）

☎️ 欲知更多详情，请联络： 
龚睛荔 011-60798623

🌟 Do you want to meet more friends? Want to create unforgettable memories during your university life? The External Affairs Division is waiting for you to join!

🎯 What is the External Affairs Division?Established on 11th December 2022, the External Affairs Division primarily assists the Vice President of External Affairs in handling the society’s external affairs, including:
* Hosting visiting student groups from other universities.
* Promoting the exciting activities of the Chinese Language Society.
* Participating in events at other universities and building connections with more people.

🎮 Who should join the External Affairs Division?
* Those who love socializing and enjoy interacting with others
* Anyone who wants to make new friends (maybe even meet someone special!)
* Students eager to gain event management experience and enhance their organizational skills
* Or simply those who feel bored and want to add some excitement to their university life!
No matter if you fit the above traits or not, we welcome everyone to join us!

Don‘t hesitate anymore—click the link below to fill out the form and create an amazing story with the External Affairs Division!
🔗 Registration link: https://forms.gle/3vfyExoSYYmF7Dg98
⏰ Registration deadline: 10th February 2025 (Monday)

☎️ For more information, please contact:
Keng Jing Li 011-60798623

🌟 感谢您的支持，愿我们在新的一年继续携手前行，共创美好未来！

✨🐍 Welcome the prosperous Year of the Snake with renewed hope and joy! ✨

The year 2025 marks the Year of the Snake in the Chinese zodiac. The snake represents wisdom, agility, and charm in Chinese culture. May we embrace the new year with intelligence and grace, overcoming challenges with confidence! 🤩

🌸 On this festive occasion, Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes you:
A Happy and Prosperous New Year!
Harmony in your family and success in your endeavors!
Good health and happiness in all that you do!

🌟 Thank you for your support. May we continue to work together for a brighter future in the coming year!

caption:
✨捕捉春节之美，共享节日喜悦！✨

农历新年即将到来，诚邀您参与”新春摄影比赛”！用您的镜头记录属于农历新年的美好瞬间，无论是充满故事感的人物，还是洋溢节日气氛的景色，都期待您的精彩呈现！

📅开放时间：2025年1月23日（星期四）至 2025年2月13日（星期四）
📤提交方式：请将参赛作品及作品简介上传至指定的Google Form
🔗链接：https://forms.gle/musA4jTUqVkCWW4H7

🎯摄影主题：农历新年
作品可以是生动的人物，温馨的家庭团聚，或节日气息浓郁的风景等，主题不限，只需传递浓郁的新春氛围即可！

📷用镜头讲述新春故事，期待您的作品大放异彩！

✨ Capture the Beauty of the New Year and Share the Festive Joy!✨

As the Lunar New Year approaches, we warmly invite you to participate in the Extravaganza “Serpent”- Lunar New Year Spring Festival Photography Contest!🏮 Use your lens to capture the wonderful moments of the Lunar New Year, whether it’s storytelling portraits or festive scenery, we look forward to your outstanding entries!

📅Submission Period: 23rd January 2025 (Thursday) to 13th February 2025 (Thursday)
📤Submission Method: Please upload your entry and a brief description of your work via the designated Google Form.
🔗Link:https://forms.gle/musA4jTUqVkCWW4H7

🎯Photography Theme: Lunar New Year
Your work can feature dynamic portraits, warm family reunions or scenery filled with festive vibes. There are no restrictions on the theme, as long as it conveys a rich Lunar New Year atmosphere!

📷Tell your New Year story through your lens, and we look forward to seeing your outstanding work!

caption:
🌟 你想认识更多志同道合的朋友吗？想要在大学生活中留下更难忘的回忆吗？外务团等你来！

🎯 外务团是什么？
外务团成立于2022年12月11日，主要是协助外务副主席处理学会的外交事务，包括：
* 接待访问校园的外校学生团体
* 宣传华文学会的精彩活动
* 参与其他学校的活动，与更多人建立联系

🎮 适合加入外务团的你：
* 热爱社交，喜欢与人交流
* 想认识更多朋友（也许还能遇见命中注定的人哦！）
* 渴望积累活动经验，提升组织能力
* 或者只是觉得无聊，想给大学生活增添点不一样的色彩
不管你有没有以上特征，我们都欢迎你的加入！

别再犹豫啦，赶快点击链接填写表格，让我们一起创造属于外务团的精彩故事吧！
🔗 报名链接： https://forms.gle/3vfyExoSYYmF7Dg98
⏰ 报名截止日期： 10/2/2025 （星期一）

☎️ 欲知更多详情，请联络： 
龚睛荔 011-60798623

🌟 Do you want to meet more friends? Want to create unforgettable memories during your university life? The External Affairs Division is waiting for you to join!

🎯 What is the External Affairs Division?Established on 11th December 2022, the External Affairs Division primarily assists the Vice President of External Affairs in handling the society’s external affairs, including:
* Hosting visiting student groups from other universities.
* Promoting the exciting activities of the Chinese Language Society.
* Participating in events at other universities and building connections with more people.

🎮 Who should join the External Affairs Division?
* Those who love socializing and enjoy interacting with others
* Anyone who wants to make new friends (maybe even meet someone special!)
* Students eager to gain event management experience and enhance their organizational skills
* Or simply those who feel bored and want to add some excitement to their university life!
No matter if you fit the above traits or not, we welcome everyone to join us!

Don‘t hesitate anymore—click the link below to fill out the form and create an amazing story with the External Affairs Division!
🔗 Registration link: https://forms.gle/3vfyExoSYYmF7Dg98
⏰ Registration deadline: 10th February 2025 (Monday)

☎️ For more information, please contact:
Keng Jing Li 011-60798623

📣 Recruitment for Chinese New Year Extravaganza Series Event Organizing Committee‼️
"Every street and alley, every person's mouth, the first words upon meeting are 'Congratulations, congratulations!'" Wow, is Chinese New Year around the corner?! 🤩🤩 That's right! With full sincerity, we are planning a series of Chinese New Year activities 🤤

If you're passionate about event planning, or skilled in design, social media, on-site management, and more, come join us in creating an exciting and innovative traditional Chinese New Year celebration 🎶 We need you 🫵

This is an opportunity to showcase your creativity and team spirit 😋 You'll work with like-minded people to organize festive events and immerse yourself in the rich Chinese New Year atmosphere of Malaysia 🥳

🧧 How to sign up?
Simply scan or click on our registration link, fill out a quick form, and let us know the role you'd like to take on 🤩🤩

Registration Link🔗: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScR6HUwOZns_rKHGm9V284r-7AqVXiz6z7WUvLWLxFZo4wyIA/viewform

🗓️Deadline of Recruitment : 27/12/2024
🗓️Interview Date : 28 - 30/12/2024

Join us and create an extraordinary Chinese New Year together 🌷

caption:
🌟 你想认识更多志同道合的朋友吗？想要在大学生活中留下更难忘的回忆吗？外务团等你来！

🎯 外务团是什么？
外务团成立于2022年12月11日，主要是协助外务副主席处理学会的外交事务，包括：
* 接待访问校园的外校学生团体
* 宣传华文学会的精彩活动
* 参与其他学校的活动，与更多人建立联系

🎮 适合加入外务团的你：
* 热爱社交，喜欢与人交流
* 想认识更多朋友（也许还能遇见命中注定的人哦！）
* 渴望积累活动经验，提升组织能力
* 或者只是觉得无聊，想给大学生活增添点不一样的色彩
不管你有没有以上特征，我们都欢迎你的加入！

别再犹豫啦，赶快点击链接填写表格，让我们一起创造属于外务团的精彩故事吧！
🔗 报名链接： https://forms.gle/3vfyExoSYYmF7Dg98
⏰ 报名截止日期： 10/2/2025 （星期一）

☎️ 欲知更多详情，请联络： 
龚睛荔 011-60798623

🌟 Do you want to meet more friends? Want to create unforgettable memories during your university life? The External Affairs Division is waiting for you to join!

🎯 What is the External Affairs Division?Established on 11th December 2022, the External Affairs Division primarily assists the Vice President of External Affairs in handling the society’s external affairs, including:
* Hosting visiting student groups from other universities.
* Promoting the exciting activities of the Chinese Language Society.
* Participating in events at other universities and building connections with more people.

🎮 Who should join the External Affairs Division?
* Those who love socializing and enjoy interacting with others
* Anyone who wants to make new friends (maybe even meet someone special!)
* Students eager to gain event management experience and enhance their organizational skills
* Or simply those who feel bored and want to add some excitement to their university life!
No matter if you fit the above traits or not, we welcome everyone to join us!

Don‘t hesitate anymore—click the link below to fill out the form and create an amazing story with the External Affairs Division!
🔗 Registration link: https://forms.gle/3vfyExoSYYmF7Dg98
⏰ Registration deadline: 10th February 2025 (Monday)

☎️ For more information, please contact:
Keng Jing Li 011-60798623

caption:
✨捕捉春节之美，共享节日喜悦！✨

农历新年即将到来，诚邀您参与”新春摄影比赛”！用您的镜头记录属于农历新年的美好瞬间，无论是充满故事感的人物，还是洋溢节日气氛的景色，都期待您的精彩呈现！

📅开放时间：2025年1月23日（星期四）至 2025年2月13日（星期四）
📤提交方式：请将参赛作品及作品简介上传至指定的Google Form
🔗链接：https://forms.gle/musA4jTUqVkCWW4H7

🎯摄影主题：农历新年
作品可以是生动的人物，温馨的家庭团聚，或节日气息浓郁的风景等，主题不限，只需传递浓郁的新春氛围即可！

📷用镜头讲述新春故事，期待您的作品大放异彩！

✨ Capture the Beauty of the New Year and Share the Festive Joy!✨

As the Lunar New Year approaches, we warmly invite you to participate in the Extravaganza “Serpent”- Lunar New Year Spring Festival Photography Contest!🏮 Use your lens to capture the wonderful moments of the Lunar New Year, whether it’s storytelling portraits or festive scenery, we look forward to your outstanding entries!

📅Submission Period: 23rd January 2025 (Thursday) to 13th February 2025 (Thursday)
📤Submission Method: Please upload your entry and a brief description of your work via the designated Google Form.
🔗Link:https://forms.gle/musA4jTUqVkCWW4H7

🎯Photography Theme: Lunar New Year
Your work can feature dynamic portraits, warm family reunions or scenery filled with festive vibes. There are no restrictions on the theme, as long as it conveys a rich Lunar New Year atmosphere!

📷Tell your New Year story through your lens, and we look forward to seeing your outstanding work!

无论岁月如何流转，新年的希望始终闪耀。愿这个元旦为你开启崭新的篇章，2024的努力化作丰硕果实，2025的期盼逐步成真。

📣重要宣布！重要宣布！ 密室逃脱《囚嬲》的早鸟票正式开售！！！ 
📣今日起限量发售，先到先得。绝对让你物超所值！ 

密室逃脱《囚嬲》活动详情如下：
🗓日期： 
大众开放：16/11/2024（星期六）- 17/11/2024 (星期日) 
外校开放：23/11/2024（星期六）- 24/11/2024 (星期日)

我们将为你带来以两种不同视角作为开端的密室：《镜像禁锢》与《以爱之名》。有趣的剧情设计及烧脑的解密环节，将给你带来一场难忘的沉浸式体验！ 欢迎大家趁着优惠价格加入我们，一同揭晓密室里究竟发生了什么吧！ 🔎 

报名链接🔗：
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSccwh6UYtDxQZ_SmtG6CS6cuz3vQuzDeH9AY7OxiKBoQM6saA/viewform?usp=pp_url

🫧颜筠霓 018-2027177 
🫧李秉佑 011-13377137 
🫧李秀芳 011-10648189 
🫧特讷韘裤马勒 011-28530480

📣Attention!  Attention!  Early bird tickets for the Escape Room are now available!!!!  
📣We will be selling early bird tickets today on a first-come-first-served basis! It's definitely a great value for your money!  

Escape Room "Abyss" Event Details: 
🗓Date: 
Public Open Session: 16/11/2024（Saturday）- 17/11/2024 (Sunday) 
External University Open Session: 23/11/2024（Saturday）- 24/11/2024 (Sunday) 
🕙Time: 10am - 10pm 
📍Venue: Multimedia University (Cyberjaya)

We have two different escape rooms, <Mirror Imprisonment> and <By the Name of Love>, each starting from the perspectives of different genders. With intriguing storylines and mind-bending puzzles, these rooms offer an immersive experience that varies depending on your chosen viewpoint! Join us to uncover the mysteries concealed within these rooms, and don't miss out on the early bird discount!🔎

caption:
中秋节🥮🎑
中秋节起源于古代中国，最初是为了庆祝丰收和祭拜月亮。相传后羿射日后，他的妻子嫦娥因吞下仙丹飞上月宫，成为节日的神话背景。此节日象征团圆，月饼则起源于元朝时传递起义信息的习俗。中秋节以月亮、团圆和思念亲人为核心，是团聚和感恩的传统节日。🧑‍🧑‍🧒

中秋节不仅是赏月的时刻，更是阖家团圆、共享美好时光的节日。在这个特别的日子里，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会祝愿大家花好月圆，阖家幸福，中秋快乐！🌕🥮

Mid-Autumn Festival 🥮🎑
The Mid-Autumn Festival originated in ancient China, initially celebrated for the harvest and worship of the moon. According to legend, after Houyi shot down the suns, his wife Chang’e swallowed the elixir of immortality and ascended to the moon, becoming the mythological background of the festival. This festival symbolizes reunion, while mooncakes trace back to the Yuan dynasty, when they were used to pass secret messages for rebellion. The Mid-Autumn Festival centers around the moon, family reunions, and longing for loved ones, making it a time for togetherness and gratitude. 🧑‍🧑‍🧒

The Mid-Autumn Festival is not only a time for moon-gazing but also for family reunions and sharing precious moments. On this special day, the Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes everyone a joyful Mid-Autumn Festival, with full moon blessings and happiness for your family! 🌕🥮

caption:
屠妖节，又称为灯节，是印度教的重要节日，象征着光明战胜黑暗、善良战胜邪恶。在这个节日里，人们点亮油灯，装饰家园，庆祝新的一年即将到来。

屠妖节不仅是庆祝光明的时刻，更是让我们反思自我、传递爱与希望的时刻。在这个节日里，我们点亮了心中的灯火，祈愿未来的每一天都能充满温暖与幸福。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会在此祝贺大家屠妖节快乐！让我们团聚在亲朋好友的身边，共享丰盛的美食与美味的点心。愿每一个人都能感受到这份浓浓的节日氛围。

Deepavali, also known as the Festival of Lights, is an important celebration in Hinduism, symbolizing the victory of light over darkness and good over evil. During this festival, people light oil lamps, decorate their homes, and celebrate the arrival of a new year.

Deepavali is not only a time for celebrating light but also an opportunity for self-reflection and the sharing of love and hope. During this festival, we ignite the light within our hearts, wishing for every day to be filled with warmth and happiness.

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes everyone a Happy Deepavali! Let us gather with family and friends to share a bountiful feast and delicious treats. May everyone feel the warmth of this festive spirit!
alt: Photo by 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会 on October 31, 2024.
ownerFullName: 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会

caption:
中秋节🥮🎑
中秋节起源于古代中国，最初是为了庆祝丰收和祭拜月亮。相传后羿射日后，他的妻子嫦娥因吞下仙丹飞上月宫，成为节日的神话背景。此节日象征团圆，月饼则起源于元朝时传递起义信息的习俗。中秋节以月亮、团圆和思念亲人为核心，是团聚和感恩的传统节日。🧑‍🧑‍🧒

中秋节不仅是赏月的时刻，更是阖家团圆、共享美好时光的节日。在这个特别的日子里，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会祝愿大家花好月圆，阖家幸福，中秋快乐！🌕🥮

Mid-Autumn Festival 🥮🎑
The Mid-Autumn Festival originated in ancient China, initially celebrated for the harvest and worship of the moon. According to legend, after Houyi shot down the suns, his wife Chang’e swallowed the elixir of immortality and ascended to the moon, becoming the mythological background of the festival. This festival symbolizes reunion, while mooncakes trace back to the Yuan dynasty, when they were used to pass secret messages for rebellion. The Mid-Autumn Festival centers around the moon, family reunions, and longing for loved ones, making it a time for togetherness and gratitude. 🧑‍🧑‍🧒

The Mid-Autumn Festival is not only a time for moon-gazing but also for family reunions and sharing precious moments. On this special day, the Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes everyone a joyful Mid-Autumn Festival, with full moon blessings and happiness for your family! 🌕🥮

caption:
Selamat Hari Malaysia！🇲🇾🌺
马来西亚日是纪念1963年9月16日马来西亚联邦成立的重要日子。这一天，马来亚联合邦、沙巴、砂拉越和新加坡联合组成了马来西亚（虽然新加坡于1965年退出）。相比1957年的独立日，马来西亚日更侧重于东马和西马的联合。自2010年起，马来西亚日成为全国公共假期，象征着全国的团结与多元文化的融合。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会在此祝福所有马来西亚人马来西亚日快乐！🇲🇾

Malaysia Day commemorates the formation of the Malaysian Federation on 16th September 1963. On this day, the Federation of Malaya, Sabah, Sarawak, and Singapore came together to form Malaysia (Singapore left in 1965). Malaysia Day focuses more on the union between East and West Malaysia compared to the Independence Day. Since 2010, Malaysia Day has been a national public holiday, symbolizing national unity and the fusion of diverse cultures.

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes all Malaysians a Happy Malaysia Day!🇲🇾

caption:
国庆日🇲🇾
马来西亚国庆日，又称“国庆日”或“独立日”，是为了纪念马来亚（现为马来西亚的一部分）于1957年8月31日从英国殖民统治中独立的重要节日。今年是马来西亚独立第67年，第67年的独立不仅仅是对过去的回顾，更是对未来的展望。让我们继续弘扬团结、多元、包容的精神，携手创造更加繁荣和谐美好的马来西亚。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会在此祝福所有的马来西亚人国庆日快乐！在这特别的日子里，让我们一起庆祝马来西亚的独立与繁荣。让我们携手共创更加美好的未来，为这个充满希望的国家而自豪！

National Day 🇲🇾Malaysia‘s National Day, also known as ”Hari Merdeka“ or ”Independence Day,“ commemorates the day when Malaya (now part of Malaysia) gained independence from British colonial rule on 31st August 1957. This year marks the 67th anniversary of Malaysia’s independence—a moment not just to reflect on the past but also to look forward to the future. Let us continue to embrace the spirit of unity, diversity, and inclusiveness as we strive together to build a more prosperous and harmonious Malaysia.
Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes all Malaysians a Happy National Day! On this special day, let us celebrate Malaysia’s independence and progress together. Let us work hand in hand to create a brighter future and be proud of this hopeful nation!
alt: Photo by 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会 on August 31, 2024.
ownerFullName: 多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会

caption:
Selamat Hari Malaysia！🇲🇾🌺
马来西亚日是纪念1963年9月16日马来西亚联邦成立的重要日子。这一天，马来亚联合邦、沙巴、砂拉越和新加坡联合组成了马来西亚（虽然新加坡于1965年退出）。相比1957年的独立日，马来西亚日更侧重于东马和西马的联合。自2010年起，马来西亚日成为全国公共假期，象征着全国的团结与多元文化的融合。

多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会在此祝福所有马来西亚人马来西亚日快乐！🇲🇾

Malaysia Day commemorates the formation of the Malaysian Federation on 16th September 1963. On this day, the Federation of Malaya, Sabah, Sarawak, and Singapore came together to form Malaysia (Singapore left in 1965). Malaysia Day focuses more on the union between East and West Malaysia compared to the Independence Day. Since 2010, Malaysia Day has been a national public holiday, symbolizing national unity and the fusion of diverse cultures.

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) wishes all Malaysians a Happy Malaysia Day!🇲🇾

caption:
“为什么你每次硬硬要讲我！”
“我觉得It's the time。”
“为了学会......”

“咔。”
“祝你生日快乐，祝你生日快乐......"

不知不觉间，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会已经走过了二十七个年头。这二十七年的旅程中，我们见证了无数青涩少年蜕变为坚毅的成人，珍藏了许多关于青春的回忆与成长的故事。虽然在人生的旅途上难免会有争执和不和，但最重要的是，在这些争执之后，大家依旧愿意彼此珍惜，共同前行。

在此，多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会诚挚感谢所有一路陪伴我们的会员们，正是你们的支持与包容，让学会在每一个风雨过后的日子里更加坚定。

让我们继续携手并肩，迎接未来的每一个光辉岁月！
多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会，二十七岁生日快乐！

"You always insist on arguing with me!"
"I think it's the time."
"For the society..."

Click.

"Happy Birthday to you, Happy Birthday to you..."

In the blink of an eye, the Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) has turned twenty-seven. Over these twenty-seven years, we have witnessed countless young members grow from inexperienced youths into resilient adults, treasuring many memories of youth and stories of growth along the way. Though conflicts and disagreements are inevitable in life, what matters most is that, after these disputes, we are still willing to cherish each other and move forward together.

On this occasion, the Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) sincerely thanks all the members who have accompanied us on this journey. Your support and understanding have made society stronger and more radiant after every storm.

Let us continue to stand together, ready to embrace every bright future that lies ahead!
Happy 27th Birthday, Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya)!

caption:
🌟 父亲节快乐！ 🌟

从孩提时代到成年，他一直是家庭中的支柱。无论遇到什么困难，他总是默默地站在家人身后，提供无尽的支持和爱。他的智慧、耐心和无私的付出，教会了孩子们如何坚强和勇敢面对生活中的挑战。

今天是属于他的日子，我们想对他说一声：“谢谢！” 谢谢他教会孩子们如何面对生活中的风风雨雨，感谢他在孩子们迷茫时给予的指导，更感激他在孩子们成功时分享的喜悦。希望今天他能感受到家人满满的爱与感激，愿他健康快乐，每一天都充满幸福。

在此多媒体大学（赛城）华文学会向所有伟大的父亲们致以最诚挚的祝福。在这个父亲节，希望每个人都能珍惜与家人相聚的时刻，感受到浓浓的亲情与关怀，共享欢乐与美好。

🌟 Happy Father’s Day! 🌟

From childhood to maturity, he has been the family‘s pillar. Regardless of the hardships, he stands quietly behind his loved ones, offering unending support and love. His wisdom, kindness, and unselfish dedication instilled in the children the fortitude and confidence to face life’s problems.

Today is his wonderful day, and we would like to say ”thank you!“ Thank you for teaching children how to weather life‘s storms, for guiding them when they got lost, and for celebrating with them when they succeeded. We hope that today he feels the entire family’s love and appreciation. Wishes him health, happiness, and joy every day.

Chinese Language Society Multimedia University (Cyberjaya) extends our heartfelt wishes to all the amazing fathers out there. On this Father‘s Day, we hope everyone can cherish the time spent with their families, feel the deep love and care, and enjoy wonderful moments together.

caption:
🔮《幻 • 幻境探秘》生活营报名正式开始！🧙‍♂️

你是否渴望探索一个充满魔法与神秘的世界？在波德申海滩，我们将穿越幻境，揭开魔法的秘密，寻找隐藏的宝藏！🌊 这将是一场2天1夜的奇幻冒险，不仅有精彩的活动，还有提供交通服务，让你无忧前往！

《幻 • 幻境探秘》生活营详情如下：
日期：2024年9月7日（星期六）至2024年9月8日（星期日）
时间：8:30am（星期六）- 7:00pm（星期日）
地点：波德申海滩🏝️
报名费：RM45（会员）；RM48（非会员）

让我们一起逃离城市喧嚣，踏上一段专属于我们的奇幻之旅吧！✨

Join us at Port Dickson Beach as we journey through enchanted realms, uncover magical secrets, and search for hidden treasures! 🌊This will be a 2-day, 1-night adventure filled with excitement, with transportation provided to ensure a worry-free journey!

Details of the Life Camp - ”Fantasy • Explore the Fantasy“ is as follow: 
Date: 7th September 2024 (Saturday) to 8th September 2024 (Sunday) 
Time: 8:30 AM (Saturday) - 7:00 PM (Sunday) 
Location: Port Dickson Beach 🏝️ 
Registration Fee: RM45 (Member); RM48 (Non-Member)

caption:
结束了迷宫冒险后的你是不是觉得意犹未尽呢？🧟 是时候开启我们新的征程啦！你准备好迎接更多烧脑又刺激的挑战了吗⁉️🧠

下一章的冒险正悄悄地拉开序幕，神秘的惊喜还在前方等着你哦！📜请诸位持续关注我们的更新，一起踏上这场激动人心的新旅程，携手揭开这片全新的世界，抢先体验即将到来的惊喜与挑战，共同迎接更多的精彩瞬间吧！🛸✨

After completing the labyrinth adventure,would you like to carry on exploring now?🧟 It’s time to embark on our next adventure! Are you ready for more thrilling and mind-numbing challenges⁉️🧠

The next exciting phase of your journey is about to begin, and unexpected surprises are still in store for you up ahead! 📜Please keep an eye out for our updates, set off on this thrilling new adventure with us, explore the unknown together, face the difficulties and surprises that lie ahead, and welcome more amazing times spent together!🛸✨

caption:
📣重要宣布！重要宣布！ 密室逃脱《囚嬲》的早鸟票正式开售！！！ 
📣今日起限量发售，先到先得。绝对让你物超所值！ 

密室逃脱《囚嬲》活动详情如下：
🗓日期： 
大众开放：16/11/2024（星期六）- 17/11/2024 (星期日) 
外校开放：23/11/2024（星期六）- 24/11/2024 (星期日) 
🕙时间：10am - 10pm 
📍地点：多媒体大学（赛城）

我们将为你带来以两种不同视角作为开端的密室：《镜像禁锢》与《以爱之名》。有趣的剧情设计及烧脑的解密环节，将给你带来一场难忘的沉浸式体验！ 欢迎大家趁着优惠价格加入我们，一同揭晓密室里究竟发生了什么吧！ 🔎 

报名链接🔗：
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSccwh6UYtDxQZ_SmtG6CS6cuz3vQuzDeH9AY7OxiKBoQM6saA/viewform?usp=pp_url  

欲知更多详情，请联系 :  
🫧颜筠霓 018-2027177 
🫧李秉佑 011-13377137 
🫧李秀芳 011-10648189 
🫧特讷韘裤马勒 011-28530480

📣Attention!  Attention!  Early bird tickets for the Escape Room are now available!!!!  
📣We will be selling early bird tickets today on a first-come-first-served basis! It's definitely a great value for your money!  

Escape Room "Abyss" Event Details: 
🗓Date: 
Public Open Session: 16/11/2024（Saturday）- 17/11/2024 (Sunday) 
External University Open Session: 23/11/2024（Saturday）- 24/11/2024 (Sunday) 
🕙Time: 10am - 10pm 
📍Venue: Multimedia University (Cyberjaya)

We have two different escape rooms, <Mirror Imprisonment> and <By the Name of Love>, each starting from the perspectives of different genders. With intriguing storylines and mind-bending puzzles, these rooms offer an immersive experience that varies depending on your chosen viewpoint! Join us to uncover the mysteries concealed within these rooms, and don't miss out on the early bird discount!🔎 

Registration Link🔗:
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSccwh6UYtDxQZ_SmtG6CS6cuz3vQuzDeH9AY7OxiKBoQM6saA/viewform?usp=pp_url
